## Problem Description

What problem are you trying to solve? What's frustrating or missing today?

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered, and why the proposed
solution is preferable.

## Additional Context

Mockups, examples from other apps, or any other context.
